title: Earnings Call Transcript: Green Thumb Q4 2024 Revenue Rises 6%
text: Green Thumb Industries' Q4 2024 earnings call transcript reveals management's perspective on the company's performance and outlook. Revenue grew 6% in Q4, demonstrating resilience in a competitive market. The company's fourth quarter revenue reached $294.3 million. Management emphasized the company's strong operational efficiency and ability to maintain profitability despite pricing pressures. The company generated $195 million in operating cash flow for the full year 2024, providing flexibility for capital allocation. Management discussed the company's share repurchase program as a reflection of confidence in the intrinsic value of the stock. The company's capital allocation strategy emphasizes return of cash to shareholders while maintaining financial flexibility for opportunistic acquisitions or growth investments. Management highlighted the company's leadership position in the cannabis industry as a profitable, cash-generative operator with national retail scale.
